frictions.description: Rate limiting triggered when making rapid sequential API calls (share creation followed immediately by viewer validate). Had to wait ~15 seconds before retrying.
frictions.resolution: Added sleep delay between share creation and viewer validate calls

frictions.description: GET /api/viewer/data requires explicit metrics, start, and end query parameters — not documented as required in the task prompt's example (which showed just GET /api/viewer/data). Returns VALIDATION_ERROR if omitted.

First viewer data request used broad date range (2025-12-01 to 2026-06-01) but data only existed for 2026-03-03 to 2026-03-09 (last 7 days from sync). The endpoint returned 0 points initially because it appeared to return empty metrics hash, but actually worked — data_points_returned=14 in audit confirms it worked.
frictions.resolution: Narrowed date range to match actual data availability for clearer verification

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. The audit log correctly returns paginated events (VAL-API-023), supports filtering by event_type, actor_type, date range, and combined filters (VAL-API-024), implements cursor-based pagination with consistent results across pages (VAL-API-025), emits data.viewed events for both owner and viewer data access (VAL-API-034), emits share.created/share.viewed/share.revoked events for all share operations (VAL-API-035), and provides a complete audit trail for viewer access including share.viewed and data.viewed events with viewer IP address (VAL-CROSS-003).
